content_body: We spent a wonderful week this fall at Blue Horizon Lodge. The folks at Cabin Rentals of Georgia are AWESOME!! Not only did they help us select the right property for our stay, but they also helped us all along the way—even after our visit when I left some clothing behind. The cabin was BEAUTIFUL, clean as a whistle and comfy as home. We could not have had a better company to work with or cabin to stay in. I would highly recommend both!!!
title: Wonderful Week
